title: Align Hangman closed-input and plugin manifest governance with the shipped implementation
description: Align Hangman closed-input and plugin manifest governance with the shipped implementation
acceptance_criteria: The canonical contract no longer claims EOF termination that the shipped loop does not implement; plugin.toml is governed by the Hangman spec and meaningful-path policy; the malformed version-2 changelog row is corrected; native verification and strict SpecSync 100% coverage pass
